testcase.name: Handling pop-up with accept
testcase.system-out: Page opened successfully The message inside the dialog box is: Press a button!

testcase.name: Handling pop-up with dismiss
testcase.system-out: Page opened successfully The message inside the dialog box is: Press a button!

testcase.name: Handling pop-up with prompt
testcase.system-out: Page opened successfully Dialog message: Please enter your name:
